languages.text: {n}Эоганн вновь закрывает глаза.{/n} "Селезенка... укрыта в левом подреберье, позади желудка. Органическая. Правое легкое..."
{n}He closes his eyes again.{/n} "Spleen... tucked in the left hypochondrium, behind the stomach. Organic. Right lung..."

languages.text: {n}Er schließt wieder die Augen.{/n} "Milz ... verborgen im linken Hypochondrium, hinter dem Magen. Organisch. Rechte Lunge ..."
languages.original_text: {n}He closes his eyes again.{/n} "Spleen... tucked in the left hypochondrium, behind the stomach. Organic. Right lung..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Er schließt wieder die Augen.{/n} "Milz ... verborgen im linken Hypochondrium, hinter dem Magen. Organisch. Rechte Lunge ..."

languages.text: {n}Il referme les yeux.{/n} « La rate... nichée au niveau de l'hypocondre gauche, derrière l'estomac. Organique... Poumon droit... »
languages.original_text: {n}He closes his eyes again.{/n} "Spleen... tucked in the left hypochondrium, behind the stomach. Organic. Right lung..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Il referme les yeux.{/n} « La rate... nichée au niveau de l'hypocondre gauche, derrière l'estomac. Organique... Poumon droit... »

languages.text: {n}Vuelve a cerrar los ojos.{/n} «Bazo... situado en el hipocondrio izquierdo, tras el estómago. Orgánico. Pulmón derecho...».
languages.original_text: {n}He closes his eyes again.{/n} "Spleen... tucked in the left hypochondrium, behind the stomach. Organic. Right lung..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vuelve a cerrar los ojos.{/n} «Bazo... situado en el hipocondrio izquierdo, tras el estómago. Orgánico. Pulmón derecho...».

languages.text: {n}Gözlerini tekrar kapatıyor.{/n} "Dalak... Midenin arkasında, sol hipokondriyuma sıkışmış. Organik. Sağ akciğer..."
languages.original_text: {n}He closes his eyes again.{/n} "Spleen... tucked in the left hypochondrium, behind the stomach. Organic. Right lung..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Gözlerini tekrar kapatıyor.{/n} "Dalak... Midenin arkasında, sol hipokondriyuma sıkışmış. Organik. Sağ akciğer..."

languages.text: {n}他又闭上了眼睛。{/n}“脾脏……位于左季肋区，胃的后方，为有机结构。右肺……”
languages.original_text: {n}He closes his eyes again.{/n} "Spleen... tucked in the left hypochondrium, behind the stomach. Organic. Right lung..."

traits.locale_text: {n}他又闭上了眼睛。{/n}“脾脏……位于左季肋区，胃的后方，为有机结构。右肺……”

languages.text: {n}彼は再び目を閉じる。{/n}「脾臓……左季肋部、胃の後方に収まる。有機。右肺……」
